task: Browse a user homepage that reposted the top song from the Top 50 Rock chart.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated from SoundCloud to the Rock chart, identified the top song as “Freakin’ Out” by Dexter and The Moonrocks, opened the track’s repost list, and then opened a reposting user’s homepage. The final page content clearly shows the IRIS profile with an item labeled “Track: Freakin’ Out by Dexter and The Moonrocks, reposted by IRIS,” which satisfies browsing a user homepage that reposted the top song. Although page.url() still showed the prior track URL due to SPA/navigation quirks, the visible page title and DOM content confirm the IRIS homepage was reached.
final_result_response: Done. I opened the SoundCloud homepage for **IRIS**, a user who reposted **“Freakin’ Out” by Dexter and The Moonrocks**, the #1 song on the Top 50 Rock chart I found.
action_history: Opening SoundCloud: const p1 = await openTab('https://soundcloud.com/');
Opening top Rock song: await page.locator('e171').click();
Opening full repost list: await page.locator('e134').click();
Opening a reposting user's homepage: await page.locator('e174').click();
